tracks.title: Pursuit
tracks.reason: The relentless, driving 16th-note arpeggiator and aggressive, simple synth timbre is a direct model for our 'Corrupted Lead'.

tracks.title: The Hand That Feeds
tracks.reason: Its driving, layered industrial rock groove and simple, powerful bassline provide a perfect template for building intensity through layering.
tracks.search_terms: nine inch nails the hand that feeds midi

tracks.title: Shipwreck
tracks.reason: The complex, skittering percussion and deep, physical sub-bass demonstrate the balance of chaos and weight we're aiming for.
